# interactive-inventory.md template

One file per page (or per major mode of an SPA). Generated by [dom-enumeration.js](dom-enumeration.js). Lives at `audit/<site-slug>/snapshots/<date>/<page-slug>-inventory.md`.

The enumeration script writes the header + element rows. You fill in the `Region`, `Probed`, `Result`, and `Notes` columns as you walk the inventory.

<!-- Generated by website-replication-skill/references/dom-enumeration.js -->

| ID | Selector | Tag | Label / aria-label | Disabled | Bounding box | Region | Probed | Result | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| i000 | `#submit-btn` | button | Submit | | 480,520 120×40 | Z1 | ✓ | observed: `POST /api/submit`; Z2 enters loading; URL unchanged | |
| i001 | `[role=tab][aria-label="History"]` | div[role=tab] | History | | 720,80 80×32 | Z3 | ✓ | observed: tab switches; no URL change; Z3 list updates | url-state gap |
| i002 | `button[aria-label="Clear all"]` | button | Clear all | | 60,520 80×32 | Z1 | ✓ | observed: empties textarea; Z2 unchanged | |
| i003 | `a[href="/help"]` | a | Help | | 1200,40 40×24 | Z0 | ✗ | skipped: external help center, out of scope | |
| i004 | `[data-testid="upload-input"]` | input | Choose file | yes | 200,400 200×40 | Z1 | ✓ | inferred: gated paid feature; clicking opens upsell modal | blocked |

## Column conventions

- **ID** — stable for the duration of the audit. Format `i<3-digit>` from enumeration order. Re-enumeration after state changes appends new IDs (`i012`, `i013` ...); old IDs keep their meaning.
- **Selector** — best-effort stable selector. Priority: `#id` → `[data-testid=...]` → `[aria-label=...]` → `tag[aria-label=...]`. Avoid nth-child / DOM-tree selectors; they break on re-render.
- **Tag** — element tag, with `[role=*]` suffix when an ARIA role is set.
- **Label / aria-label** — first non-empty of: `aria-label`, `title`, text content (first 60 chars), `name`, `placeholder`, `value`.
- **Disabled** — `yes` if `disabled` attribute or `aria-disabled="true"`; empty otherwise.
- **Bounding box** — `x,y w×h` in CSS pixels. Useful for spotting offscreen / hidden elements and for grouping by screen region.
- **Region** — semantic `Z*` region ID from the Page Region Relationship Model. Use `Z0` only for global shell or out-of-scope chrome.
- **Probed** — `✓` if the agent actually interacted with the element; `✗` if skipped (must explain in Result).
- **Result** — short imperative. Include: network call observed (method + route), source region, target region, state transition, URL change, redirect, error text, success affordance. Tag inference type: `observed` / `inferred` / `blocked`.
- **Notes** — gaps in target product, anomalies, follow-up needed.

## Re-enumeration

Run [dom-enumeration.js](dom-enumeration.js) again after any major state change:

- Mode / tab switch
- Modal / drawer / popover open
- Successful submit (post-submit DOM often differs)
- Auth state change

Before re-running, set the next unused ID so the appended rows stay stable:

```js
window.__websiteReplicationInventoryOptions = { startIndex: 12 };
```

Append the new rows below the existing ones with a divider:

```markdown
<!-- After opening "New project" modal -->
| i012 | ... |
| i013 | ... |
```

## Coverage reporting

After step 8 (Reflect and verify coverage), summarize in the deliverable's *Interaction Coverage* block:

- **Enumerated**: total row count across all inventories for this audit
- **Probed**: count of `✓` rows
- **Coverage**: `Probed / Enumerated (X%)` — flag if under 90% without `blocked` reason
- **Un-probed list**: every `✗` row's reason, grouped by category (out-of-scope, blocked, decorative-confirmed)
